name: ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc.
summary: ServisFirst Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary ServisFirst Bank. It offers commercial, consumer, and other loans, deposit accounts, electronic banking, online and mobile banking, remote deposit capture, treasury and cash management services, and correspondent banking services. As of December 31, 2025, it had $17.73 billion in total assets, operating 33 full-service banking offices across Alabama, Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, and Virginia.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Seasonal, bridge, and term loans to small- and medium-sized businesses for working capital, property, equipment, and inventory.

products.name: Commercial Lines of Credit
products.description: Revolving credit facilities offered to business and professional service firm borrowers.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Loans to individual consumers including personal installment and home equity products.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Demand, time, savings, and other deposit products accepted from retail and commercial customers.

products.name: Treasury and Cash Management Services
products.description: Cash management and treasury solutions delivered to business customers.

products.name: Correspondent Banking Services
products.description: Banking services provided to other financial institutions.

products.name: Online and Mobile Banking
products.description: Electronic banking including online banking, mobile banking, and remote deposit capture for customers.
